name: Bond Resources Inc.
summary: Bond Resources Inc. engages in the exploration of mineral properties. It holds interest in the Mary K prospect located in Elk City Mining District, Idaho County. The company also holds 100% interests in the Aspen property claim block covering an area of 1,292 hectares located in Nechako Plateau in British Columbia, as well as the Bearcat mineral property located in Nazko, British Columbia. The company was formerly known as J. Bond Capital Corporation and changed its name to Bond Resources Inc. in November 2018. Bond Resources Inc. is based in Vancouver, Canada.
